title: 100 Day's at Freddy's
body:
"If Five Nights weren't difficult enough."

-------------------------

100 Day's at Freddy's ( Also known as AHDaF ), is a FNaF themed modpack for the Forge 1.19.2 version of Minecraft, which includes content from the famous FNaF games and more!

Since Modrinth ( shockingly ) didn't have a FNaF themed modpack, i decided to be the first one to try making one!

Inspired by various other FNaF themed modpacks out there.

Hope you guys enjoy!

-------------------------

I highly reccomend you check the keybinds and rebind any thing that conflicts.
